# Keppet Open Sports (KOS)

Free, keyless open sports data: evidence rows in git, served by CDN. The repo stores facts; agents synthesize. Every number is citable to a stored row; refusals are first-class, machine-readable data.

- Catalog: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/catalog.json
- Status (freshness, calendar-aware): https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/status.json
- License register: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/build/license-register.json

## f1

- Events: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/f1/v1/events/
- Athletes/teams: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/f1/v1/athletes/ · https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/f1/v1/teams/
- Schedule: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/forge-arcana/kos-data@main/f1/v1/schedule/
- Sources (ranked): f1db, wikidata, open-meteo, polymarket
- Attribution: F1 data by F1DB (https://github.com/f1db/f1db), licensed CC BY 4.0 · Entity data from Wikidata (CC0 1.0) · Weather data by Open-Meteo.com (CC BY 4.0) · Market prices via Polymarket public API

### Coverage and gaps (the honesty contract)

- result: full (floor 1950) — f1db CC BY backbone: every world-championship session 1950-present.
- perf: partial (floor 1994) — Pit-stop counts from f1db's pit-stop data era (1994+); earlier races have no per-stop records.
- form: full (floor 1950) — Drivers' standings after every round, f1db 1950-present.
- cond: partial (floor 1950) — Open-Meteo hourly reanalysis joined by venue coordinates; model estimate at the venue, not track-side sensor data.
  proxies: cond.temp_c, cond.precip_mm, cond.wind_kmh
- avail: none — No keyless personnel-status feed exists for F1; driver substitutions surface only post-hoc in results.
- market: partial (floor 2024) — Prediction markets (Polymarket) 2024-present only; no keyless bookmaker odds history for F1. Public per owner decision 2026-07-19 (OQ #6 closed: rights unlocated, not denied); excluded from commercial delivery.
- meas: partial (floor 1950) — Fastest race lap from f1db (stepped horizon: timing precision improves by era). Speed-trap and telemetry measurements have no license-clean source (SR G7).
- agg: full (floor 1950) — f1db source-published driver season and career totals; independent cross-check for card-derived aggregates.
- h2h: full — Derived-only from stored result rows over shared events; no stored metric (OM §14.1).
